frame_id.description: Stable frame identifier derived from capture_wall_ms and zero-padded frame_seq.

observation_ref.description: Optional Observation.observation_id linked to the visual frame.

channel.description: Stable logical camera or display channel, e.g. center_mfd.

layout_id.description: Stable visual-layout identifier, resolved to canonical normalized native-viewport geometry via pack vision_layout.yaml.

image_uri.description: Absolute artifact path or URI for the VLM-ready frame produced by the Python-side crop pipeline.

source_image_path.description: Original DCS-side source frame path referenced by frames.jsonl.

width.description: Source frame width in pixels from the manifest.

height.description: Source frame height in pixels from the manifest.

source_session_id.description: DCS-side capture session that produced the source frame.
